reviews.review_description: Neat use of “bullet time” (pun intended lol) without feeling like an attempt to clone super hot.  Innovative full room scale when full room scale apps are still pretty rare.  Some type of dramatic background music (with a toggle on/off) could even further enhance the app.  Made it to level 7 so far and there is a good smooth difficulty curve.  Definitely getting more challenging!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! Will look into adding music that you can toggle! :)
